revision.comment: Bot: Creating redirect for category from [[Iso no Sukune]].
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Category:e=true|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ichishi no Nagaochi|fr}} no Sukune, served as the chief priest of the Yamato Ōkunidama Shrine during Emperor Suinin's reign, overseeing important religious ceremonies.<ref>https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E5%80%AD%E5%9B%BD%E9%80%A0</ref> ==Genealogy== {{User:Immanuelle/Generations of Watatsumi}} ==Footnotes== ===Notes=== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ===References=== [[ja:五十野宿祢]] [[Category:Bot created categories]]

[[:en:Category:e=true|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ichishi no Nagaochi|fr}} no Sukune, served as the chief priest of the Yamato Ōkunidama Shrine during Emperor Suinin's reign, overseeing important religious ceremonies.<ref>https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E5%80%AD%E5%9B%BD%E9%80%A0</ref> ==Genealogy== {{User:Immanuelle/Generations of Watatsumi}} ==Footnotes== ===Notes=== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ===References=== [[ja:五十野宿祢]] [[Category:Bot created categories]]

[[:en:Category:e=true|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ichishi no Nagaochi|fr}} no Sukune, served as the chief priest of the Yamato Ōkunidama Shrine during Emperor Suinin's reign, overseeing important religious ceremonies.<ref>https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E5%80%AD%E5%9B%BD%E9%80%A0</ref> ==Genealogy== {{User:Immanuelle/Generations of Watatsumi}} ==Footnotes== ===Notes=== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ===References=== [[ja:五十野宿祢]] [[Category:Bot created categories]] [[Category:pages to be overwritten]]

revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:User:Immanuelle/Ichishi no Nagaochi]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of User:Immanuelle/Ichishi no Nagaochi]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Wikipedia overwrites]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category Wikipedia overwrites
